intent: Let the todo notes app (dev.kuhy.todo) keep running during the post-23:00 night curfew, so ideas can be captured before sleep and the crdt_sync migration can be verified on-device at night.
scope: Non-goal: no change to the general daytime WHITELIST (todo was already on it)
changes: Add dev.kuhy.todo to $NIGHT_WHITELIST (offline-first notes capture; not a scroll trap)

verification.evidence: Deploy complete; curfew_enforcer.sh pushed. dev.kuhy.todo launched and stayed running under the active 23:xx curfew (no focus-mode kill); migration verified on-device.

risks: Slightly weakens the night curfew by allowing one more app; mitigated because todo is a capture tool, not a scroll trap
rollback: Remove the dev.kuhy.todo line from $NIGHT_WHITELIST in config.sh and re-run deploy.sh
Confirm via deploy.sh --list that todo is no longer night-whitelisted
